header.title: Relationship map
header.description: When two people show up in the same conversation, a line connects them — a factual snapshot of the circles around you. Tap someone to see just their corner; tap the empty space to return to the whole web.

states.error: Couldn't load the relationship map. Please try again in a moment.

empty.title: No relationships to draw yet
empty.hint: Record a few more conversations with others present, and a web will grow here.
